fireAgency: Alhambra Fire Department — Community Risk Reduction Division (in-house)
buildingDeptNote: 111 South First Street, Alhambra CA 91801. Phone: (626) 570-5032. Counter hours: Mon–Thu 7am–Noon and 1:30–4:30pm. EnerGov/Tyler portal for permit applications. GoPost-Transtech ePlan Check for digital plan submittals.
